AVAV.headline: AeroVironment Stock Soared on a Blowout Quarter. Is the Drone Boom Just Getting Started?
AVAV.description: AeroVironment reported a blowout fiscal Q4 with 31% organic revenue growth to $642M, adjusted EBITDA more than doubling, and funded backlog surging to $1.2B. The company's counter-drone defense business is positioned as the next major growth driver, with CEO projecting it could rival or exceed loitering munitions revenue within 3-5 years. However, the stock trades at a rich 54x forward earnings multiple, suggesting much of the growth is already priced in.

AVAV.headline: AeroVironment, Inc. Notice of July 27, 2026 Application Deadline for Class Action Lawsuit - Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq. at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, Before Application Deadline
AVAV.description: A class action securities lawsuit has been filed against AeroVironment, Inc. for allegedly failing to disclose material information between June 25, 2025 and March 10, 2026. The company is accused of understating competition for U.S. Space Force contracts and overstating its business prospects. Investors who suffered losses during this period have until July 27, 2026 to request lead plaintiff status.

AVAV.headline: Why Unusual Machines Stock Jumped Today
AVAV.description: Unusual Machines (UMAC) stock surged 16.02% on Tuesday, driven by a rally in drone stocks following AeroVironment's impressive 133% revenue growth earnings report. The stock was also boosted by its inclusion in the Russell 2000 Index, which increased visibility with institutional investors.

AVAV.headline: AVAV IMPORTANT DEADLINE: ROSEN, HIGHLY REGARDED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages AeroVironment, Inc. Investors with Losses in Excess of $100K to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action - AVAV
AVAV.description: Rosen Law Firm announces securities class action lawsuits against AeroVironment, Futu Holdings Limited, and TruBridge, Inc. AeroVironment is accused of making false statements about competition risks related to U.S. Space Force contracts. Investors with losses exceeding $100,000 are encouraged to join the class actions before the July 27, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline.

ABVX.headline: Abivax announces trading resumption of its ordinary shares on Euronext Paris
ABVX.description: Abivax SA resumed trading of its ordinary shares on Euronext Paris on July 1, 2026, following a temporary halt. The company announced the pricing of an oversubscribed and upsized public offering of American Depositary Shares, increased from the previously announced $600M to $800M at $125.00 per share.

ABVX.headline: Abivax annonce la suspension temporaire du cours de ses actions ordinaires sur Euronext Paris
ABVX.description: Abivax SA announced a temporary suspension of its ordinary shares trading on Euronext Paris starting July 1, 2026 at market opening. The suspension is related to the company's public offering of American Depositary Shares (ADS) in the United States to confirm investor allocations and announce final offering terms. Trading is expected to resume around 15:30 CEST the same day.

ABVX.headline: Abivax announces temporary trading halt of its ordinary shares on Euronext Paris
ABVX.description: Abivax SA announced a temporary trading halt of its ordinary shares on Euronext Paris effective July 1, 2026, from market opening at 9:00 a.m. CEST. The halt is in connection with the company's public offering of American Depositary Shares in the United States to allow for allocation confirmation and pricing announcement. Trading is expected to resume at approximately 3:30 p.m. CEST the same day.
